problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to they, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
